title: How Anthropic Doesn't Build the WRONG Things with Claude
summary: Austin Marchese outlines four rules derived from Anthropic founders Dario and Daniela Amodei's public guidance on what to build with Claude. The video argues that most builders miss these rules and applies them to side projects, startups, and workplace automation.
